lessons.title: Nature and Requirements of Easements
lessons.description: Let me give you a precise definition. An easement is a proprietary right enjoyed by the owner of one piece of land — called the dominant tenement — over another piece of land — called the servient tenement — for the benefit of...

lessons.title: Acquisition of Easements
lessons.description: The first and most straightforward method is express grant.

lessons.title: Prescription
lessons.description: Prescription is the acquisition of an easement by long, continuous, uninterrupted use over time.

lessons.title: Extinguishment and Profits a Prendre
lessons.description: Easements can be extinguished in three main ways: by express release, by abandonment, and by unity of ownership.
